  ask        Ask ChatGPT for assistance

result.stdout:
Usage: ask [options...]

Ask ChatGPT for assistance

Options:
  -sys, --system-message <String>    System message to prime ChatGPT with (Default: null)
  -msg, --human-message <String>     Message to send to ChatGpt (Default: null)
  -verbose, --verbose                 (Optional)
